recommendations.title: Hostel: Part III
recommendations.overview: Set in Las Vegas, the film centers on a man who attends his best friend's bachelor party, unaware of an insidious agenda that plays into hunting humans.

recommendations.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 2: Texas Blood Money
recommendations.overview: A bank-robbing gang of misfits heads to Mexico with the blueprints for the perfect million-dollar heist, but when one of the crooks wanders into the wrong bar, the thieving cohorts develop a thirst for blood.

recommendations.title: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
recommendations.overview: Doctor Strange, with the help of mystical allies both old and new, traverses the mind-bending and dangerous alternate realities of the Multiverse to confront a mysterious new adversary.

recommendations.title: The Quick and the Dead
recommendations.overview: A mysterious woman comes to compete in a quick-draw elimination tournament, in a town taken over by a notorious gunman.

recommendations.title: The Evil Dead
recommendations.overview: In 1979, a group of college students find a Sumerian Book of the Dead in an old wilderness cabin they've rented for a weekend getaway.

recommendations.title: Igby Goes Down
recommendations.overview: Igby Slocumb, a rebellious and sarcastic 17-year-old boy, is at war with the stifling world of old money privilege he was born into. With a schizophrenic father, a self-absorbed, distant mother, and a shark-like young Republican big brother, Igby fig

recommendations.title: My Name Is Bruce
recommendations.overview: B-movie Legend Bruce Campbell is mistaken for his character Ash from the Evil Dead trilogy and forced to fight a real monster in a small town in Oregon.

recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.

recommendations.title: They/Them
recommendations.overview: Campers at an LGBTQ+ conversion camp endure unsettling psychological techniques while the campsite is stalked by a mysterious killer.

recommendations.title: Charlie St. Cloud
